last_comments: Defined executable contract for canonical dev command path and added red tests only. Evidence: go test ./tools/cli/ship/internal/cli ./tools/cli/ship/internal/commands fails on shipdev alias and positional dev args (expected red phase). Failing cases: TestRun_DispatchAndArgs/shipdev_alias_removed, /dev_worker_positional_removed, /dev_all_positional_removed, plus root/scoped help contract mismatch. Blocker is intentional and handed to TKT-256 implementation.
